value.found_quote: A channel is an MCP server that pushes events into a Claude Code session so Claude can react to things happening outside the terminal.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the "Channels" feature exactly as claimed: an MCP server that can push external events (webhooks, alerts, chat messages) into a Claude Code session so Claude reacts to external events. The page covers one-way channels (webhooks, CI alerts, monitoring events) and two-way channels (chat bridges like Telegram, Discord). However, the page clearly states "Channels are in research preview" and requires Claude Code v2.1.80 or later, making the lifecycle status "preview".
